user.title: Ternopil Grid Schedule
user.description: Choose a street from the searchable list and optionally enter a house number.

street.title: Change street
street.description: Choose a new street from the searchable list and optionally update the house number.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics & logging
diagnostics.description: Turn on detailed ternopil_grid debug logging for live troubleshooting.

ping.title: Ping settings
ping.description: Choose how the live power probe should resolve its target.

ping_entity.title: Ping settings
ping_entity.description: Select the Home Assistant entity that should be used as the live power probe target.

ping_manual.title: Ping settings
ping_manual.description: Enter the manual target address used for the live power probe.

error.invalid_target_source: Entity status method requires a probe device/entity target.
